dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6148 IH: Patients Over Paperwork Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Larsen of Washington (for himself, Mrs. Beatty, Ms. Tlaib, Ms. Norton, Mr. Veasey, Ms. Salinas, Mr. Moulton, Mr. Costa, Mr. Torres of New York, and Mr. Lieu) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend Public Law 119–21 to repeal certain changes to eligibility redeterminations under the Medicaid program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Patients Over Paperwork Act of 2025.

section.header: Repealing changes to eligibility redeterminations under Medicaid
section.text: Section 71107 of Public Law 119–21 is repealed, and the provisions of law amended by such section are restored as if such section had not been enacted into law.
